title: Where Is Luna?
synopsis: Luna plays peek-a-boo with her loving family members throughout their cozy home. Each page reveals Luna hiding in a different spot while family members search for her with gentle calls and sounds, creating a soothing repetitive pattern perfect for babies.

pages.text: Where is Luna? Mama calls, "Luna, Luna!"

illustration.description: A warm-skinned South Asian woman with long black hair in a soft bun, wearing a lavender cardigan, stands in a sunny living room with cream walls. She has her hands cupped around her mouth, calling gently with a loving smile. Soft watercolor pastels in peach, cream, and lavender fill the cozy space with a plush sofa and colorful cushions.
illustration.alt: Mama calling for Luna in the living room

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Luna pops up behind the big chair!

illustration.description: Luna, a cheerful toddler with warm brown skin and curly dark hair in tiny pigtails, peeks out from behind a sage green armchair with a huge delighted grin. Her bright brown eyes sparkle with joy and mischief. The soft watercolor background shows the same cozy living room in gentle pastels.
illustration.alt: Luna hiding behind a green armchair, smiling

pages.text: Where is Luna? Papa calls, "Luna, Luna!"

illustration.description: A tall Black man with short natural hair and a warm smile, wearing a soft blue sweater, stands in a sunny kitchen with white cabinets and yellow walls. He looks around searchingly with his hands on his hips, calling gently. Watercolor washes create a bright, welcoming kitchen atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Papa searching for Luna in the kitchen

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Luna giggles under the table!

illustration.description: Luna sits cross-legged under a round wooden kitchen table, her hands covering her face in a classic peek-a-boo pose, giggling with pure delight. Her curly hair bounces as she laughs. The watercolor illustration shows Papa's feet nearby and the warm yellow kitchen floor in soft, muted tones.
illustration.alt: Luna giggling while hiding under the kitchen table

pages.text: Where is Luna? Abuela calls, "Mi Luna!"

illustration.description: An elderly Latina woman with silver-streaked hair in a low bun, wearing a coral-colored blouse, stands in a bedroom with soft pink walls and white furniture. She has kind wrinkles around her eyes and gestures gently while calling. The watercolor background features a cozy bed with floral quilts in pastel tones.
illustration.alt: Abuela calling for Luna in the bedroom

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Luna waves from the closet!

illustration.description: Luna sits among hanging clothes in an open closet, waving enthusiastically with both small hands raised high. Soft fabrics in pastels surround her, and she beams with excitement. The watercolor illustration shows gentle shadows and light filtering through the clothes, creating a cozy hiding spot.
illustration.alt: Luna waving from inside a closet full of clothes

pages.text: Where is Luna? Big brother calls, "Luna!"

illustration.description: A young boy around five years old with warm brown skin and short curly hair, wearing a green striped shirt, looks around a playroom filled with colorful toys. He has Luna's same bright brown eyes and gentle smile. Soft watercolor toys in primary pastels scatter across the floor.
illustration.alt: Big brother searching in the colorful playroom

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Luna hides in the toy box!

illustration.description: Luna's curly head pops out of a large wooden toy box painted in soft mint green, surrounded by plush animals and colorful blocks that spill over the edges. She claps her hands together with absolute joy, her eyes bright with laughter. The watercolor background shows the cheerful playroom in warm, muted tones.
illustration.alt: Luna popping out of a toy box, clapping happily

pages.text: Luna runs to her family! "Here I am!" Big hugs all around!

illustration.description: The whole family gathers in the living room for a group hug with Luna in the center. Mama, Papa, Abuela, and big brother all embrace Luna with warm smiles and loving expressions. The watercolor illustration glows with golden light and soft pastels, showing the family's joy and togetherness in gentle, rounded shapes.
illustration.alt: Luna's whole family hugging together happily

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: Who calls 'Mi Luna' in the bedroom?
questions.explanation: Abuela calls Luna 'Mi Luna' which means 'My Luna' in Spanish.

questions.question: Where does Luna hide in the kitchen?
questions.explanation: Luna giggles under the kitchen table when Papa is looking for her.

questions.question: What does Luna do when she's found?
questions.explanation: Luna always says 'peek-a-boo' when she's found hiding!

pages.text: Where is Luna? Mama calls, '_____, Luna!'
_____! Luna pops up behind the big chair!
